hooks.prompt: Check both hook outputs above. (1) SAVE: If SAVE_NEEDED=true, run session_checkpoint with summary + next_steps. (2) QA: If 'QA REQUIRED' appeared, you MUST test the deployed changes in Chrome BEFORE telling Antonio it's done. Open the browser, navigate to the page, screenshot, interact, verify. If you haven't done browser QA yet, tell Antonio you need to test first.

CRITICAL: Context compaction is about to happen. The auto-save script just ran but it only saves a minimal checkpoint. You MUST NOW save DETAILED progress to dev_tasks via execute_sql with: (1) EVERY file changed, (2) EVERY commit hash, (3) EVERY CRM/DB update made, (4) exact state of in-progress work, (5) what is PENDING with specific details. Also sysdoc_update('session-context') if system state changed. This is your LAST CHANCE — after compaction you will NOT remember any of this.

Session starting. MANDATORY FIRST STEP: Read the git pull result above — if it pulled new commits, acknowledge what changed. Then follow CLAUDE.md Session Start protocol: (1) sysdoc_read('session-context'), (2) query dev_tasks for BOTH pending work (status in_progress/todo) AND recently completed (status done, ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 3) so you know what was JUST done, (3) git status + recent commits. Present: 'Last completed' + 'Pending' + 'Next steps' (from progress_log PENDING of most recent task). Then ask 'What do we work on?'
